diagrams.title: Paxos Algorithm Flow
diagrams.description: Shows the three phases of Paxos: Prepare/Prepare Promise, Accept/Accepted, and Learn/Success
diagrams.purpose: Understanding message flow in Paxos consensus algorithm

diagrams.title: Raft Leader Election State Machine
diagrams.description: Shows states (Follower, Candidate, Leader) and transitions with timeout and vote events
diagrams.purpose: Understanding Raft's leader election process and state transitions

diagrams.title: 2PC Protocol Flow
diagrams.description: Shows two-phase commit with coordinator and participants during prepare and commit phases
diagrams.purpose: Understanding atomic commit in distributed transactions

diagrams.title: Byzantine Fault Tolerance Quorum
diagrams.description: Shows how 3f+1 nodes tolerate f Byzantine failures with overlapping quorums
diagrams.purpose: Visualizing why 3f+1 nodes are needed for Byzantine fault tolerance

diagrams.title: CAP Theorem Triangle
diagrams.description: Shows the three properties of CAP theorem with trade-offs during partitions
diagrams.purpose: Understanding CAP theorem trade-offs in distributed system design

visuals.title: Consensus And Related Problems
visuals.description: Visual diagram for consensus and related problems
